title: [release-1.6] Bump github.com/prometheus/client_golang to v1.11.1
body:
Related to CVE-2022-21698 ; note that the vulnerable code is not actually reachable in Skopeo.

```sh
$ go get github.com/prometheus/client_golang@v1.11.1
$ make vendor
```

comments.body:
@mtrmac Lint is not happy.  Is there something missing in the release-1.6 branch that it's expecting?

```

---> Making bundle: validate-lint
/private/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/skopeo/hack/make/validate-lint: line 14: golint: command not found
make: *** [validate-local] Error 127
```

> ```
> /private/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/skopeo/hack/make/validate-lint: line 14: golint: command not found
> ```

The Go version running on macOS has changed since creating the branch; I have cherry-picked the update for that into this PR.
… and https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1613 to tag a Skopeo 1.6.2 release.
